tldr.title: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
tldr.author: jc4p
bullets: LLM agents struggle with multi-step logical exploits and state tracking, despite successfully identifying basic vulnerabilities like SQL injection and XSS.
Spending $1,500 on GPT-4 API calls revealed high cost-to-success ratios, making autonomous AI agents currently uneconomical for complex penetration testing.
LLMs excel as interactive co-pilots for human hackers, aiding in payload generation and code analysis rather than running fully autonomous exploits.

tldr.title: revo, the programming language
tldr.author: alurm
bullets: Revo introduces a novel syntax and execution model, targeting lightweight systems programming and efficient compiler design.
The language focuses on modern type safety, minimal runtime overhead, and potential compilation to LLVM or WebAssembly backends.
Provides compiler enthusiasts and systems engineers a sandbox to explore custom AST parsing and alternative memory management paradigms.

tldr.title: Pwnd Blaster: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
tldr.author: matthew2
bullets: Acoustic injection attacks target MEMS microphones using ultrasonic waves to silently execute unauthorized system commands on nearby PCs.
Attackers can leverage compromised smart speakers or audio systems to transmit sub-sensory, high-frequency payloads to target devices.
Key mitigations require disabling voice-wake triggers, applying software-based low-pass filters, and utilizing physical acoustic dampening on microphones.

tldr.title: VoidZero Is Joining Cloudflare
tldr.author: coloneltcb
bullets: Evan YouвЂ™s VoidZero brings Rust-powered build tools like Rolldown and Oxc directly into CloudflareвЂ™s edge developer ecosystem.
DevOps teams can expect faster CI/CD pipelines as Cloudflare integrates high-speed Rust bundlers to optimize edge worker deployments.
The acquisition positions Cloudflare to offer native, ultra-fast JavaScript compilation and bundling directly within its global edge network.

tldr.title: Morningstar values SpaceX at $780B, half its IPO target
tldr.author: berkeleyjunk
bullets: Morningstar's $780B appraisal reflects a conservative market discount on SpaceX's capital-intensive, high-capex aerospace and deep-tech business model.
The valuation hinges on Starlink achieving massive subscriber growth and SpaceX demonstrating the commercial viability of its reusable Starship launcher.
The disparity highlights the financial complexity of valuing a company transitioning from launch services to a high-margin global telecom provider.
